title: Failed to save form, please try again

posts.author: Gaalamies (Johannes )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, I keep getting same error message, when creating a new form with the AI:

“failed to save form, please try again.”

I logged in with work-account to their Monday, and to my volunteer-job account (different place and account), same error. Updated Chrome, no help.

I guess more people are experiencing the same. I am an Admin so that shouldn’t be the challenge. Ideas to try next?

Best, J.

image531×105 5.27 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I was getting that yesterday, but it WAS saving the form, and I was able to switch tabs at the top to go to the main table.
